tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP_FROM_UBU
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
exit
class-map match-any CM_ICMP
 match access-group name ICMP_FROM_UBU
exit
policy-map POLICE_ICMP
 class CM_ICMP
  police 64000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 service-policy input POLICE_ICMP
exit
end
write memory
"}
